data.title: Galaxy digital’s $40M Ethereum transfers stir market jitters as whale activity intensifies
data.description:
16-4-2025 – Galaxy Digital, a prominent player in the cryptocurrency arena, has sparked intrigue with a flurry of substantial Ethereum (ETH) transfers to Binance, totalling 25,000 ETH over three days. Valued at more than $40 million, these transactions rank among the firm’s most significant in recent times. The latest manoeuvre unfolded in two stages: an [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/galaxy-digitals-40m-ethereum-transfers-stir-market-jitters-as-whale-activity-intensifies/

data.title: ZKsync (ZK) Token Falls 8.3% After Admin Account Hack
data.description:
TL;DR ZKsync suffered a cyber attack that compromised an admin account, stealing around $5 million in ZK tokens from unclaimed airdrop funds. The protocol ensured that user funds are safe and were unaffected, maintaining the integrity of the contracts and the ZK token. The attack caused a 8. 3% drop in the price of ZK. The. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/zksync-zk-token-falls-8-3-after-admin-account-hack/

data.title: Ethena Labs exits German market following agreement with BaFin
data.description:
Synthetic stablecoin developer Ethena Labs is winding down its German operations less than a month after regulators identified “deficiencies” in its dollar-pegged USDe (USDE) stablecoin, signaling heightened scrutiny around crypto assets in Europe’s largest economy. Ethena Labs reached an agreement with Germany’s Federal Financial Supervisory Authority, also known as BaFin, to cease all operations of its local subsidiary, Ethena GmbH, according to an April 15 announcement. The company reiterated that Ethena’s German subsidiary has not conducted any mint or redeem activity for USDe since March 21, the day BaFin halted the stablecoin’s activities
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethena-labs-exits-german-market-bafin-agreement?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: On April 15, the US Bitcoin ETF had a net outflow of 457 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of 20,604 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, on April 15, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 457 BTC, of ​​which Fidelity had an outflow of 415 BTC. Fidelity currently holds 195,626 BTC, worth US$16.62 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 20,604 ETH, of which Grayscale ETHE had an outflow of 16,898 ETH. Grayscale ETHE currently holds 1,181,284 ETH, worth US$1.94 billion.

data.title: Tether Taps Self-Custody Crypto Wallet Solution Provider Fizen to Advance Global Stablecoin Adoption
data.description:
The world’s largest digital asset company has made a strategic investment in Finzen, enabling the self-custodial and crypto payments provider to facilitate the seamless integration of stablecoins across multiple blockchains.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/tether-taps-self-custody-crypto-wallet-solution-provider-fizen-to-advance-global-stablecoin-adoption/

data.title: Abraxas Capital-associated wallet withdraws 747 BTC from Binance, worth $63.78 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a wallet associated with Abraxas Capital withdrew 747 BTC worth US$63.78 million from Binance after being silent for 2 months.

data.title: He Yi published an article discussing academic qualifications and recruitment standards: It’s good to have them, but it’s okay if you don’t have them
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News He Yi published an article in Binance Square to discuss academic qualifications and talent recruitment. She pointed out that a good academic background can reflect the candidate's intelligence and ability to work hard, but knowledge is not equal to skills and thinking. She emphasized that most abilities are acquired through day-to-day improvement, and character is even more difficult to acquire. It is more important whether the candidate is upright, has clear logic, is resilient, and has a growth mindset. At the same time, she said that the company is looking for outstanding talents and does not use academic qualifications as the only criterion. Finally, she concluded, "There are many things in life that are good to have, but it doesn't matter if you don't have them."

data.title: OpenAI Develops New Social Network to Compete with Major Platforms
data.description: According to PANews, OpenAI is reportedly working on a new social network that may rival Elon Musk's X, formerly known as Twitter, and Mark Zuckerberg's Meta ecosystem. While specific details of the project have not been disclosed, it is expected to incorporate AI technology to transform the social networking experience.

data.title: OpenAI plans to launch a social networking platform similar to X
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: OpenAI is building a social network similar to the X platform, which focuses on the image generation function of GPT. The project is still in its early stages.
